0.details:
My former colleague is going through a divorce and is losing her house
She has a reliable group of friends who want to help her through this process
I want her to know I can help her and offer her any assistance she needs
I want her to move in with me
0.model_generation:
I know you're facing a lot right now as you navigate divorce and the loss of your home. I want you to know you’re not alone—I’m here for you, as are all your friends who care so deeply about your well-being.

If you need a place to stay, my door is always open. Move in anytime you need, and we can figure out the next steps together.

If you need help sorting through finances, finding housing options, or tackling paperwork, please don’t hesitate to reach out—I’m happy to help with any of it.

We all believe in your strength, resilience, and the brighter days ahead, and I’ll be here to remind you of it every step of the way.

No matter what unfolds, you’ve got a reliable support network ready to stand by your side.

Take one day at a time; I believe in you. I’m here whenever you need me.
0.final_version:
I know you're facing a lot right now as you navigate the divorce and the loss of your home. It must be very hard and lonely to go through this not knowing how you will come out of it. I want you to know you’re not alone—I’m here for you, as are all your friends who care so deeply about your well-being.

If you need a place to stay, my home is your home. Please don't hesitate to come to me and we can figure out the next steps together. My door is open 24/7.

If you need help sorting through finances, finding housing options, or tackling paperwork, I would be more than happy to take some of the load off—I’m happy to help with any of it.

We all believe in your strength, resilience, and the brighter days ahead, once again I want you to know that I am always here for you..

No matter what unfolds, you’ve got a reliable support network ready to stand by your side.

Take as much time as you need; I believe in you. I’m here whenever you need me.

1.details:
My little sister told me about the school project Sachi helped her finish
Thanking them for helping when I was not around
I would like to repay the kindness with a fun day out
1.model_generation:
Dear Sachi,

I’m writing to thank you for helping my little sister with her school project last week. She couldn’t stop talking about how patient and encouraging you were as you guided her through each step. Knowing that you stepped in when I wasn’t around means so much to our whole family, and your support made all the difference in boosting her confidence and enthusiasm.

Your willingness to share your skills and time is truly appreciated. I’d love to repay your kindness by treating you to a fun day out—maybe a trip to the art museum, lunch at that new café downtown, or a movie afternoon followed by ice cream. Let me know when you’re free, and we’ll plan something special to celebrate.

Thank you again for your generosity and for being such a wonderful friend to my sister.

Sincerely,
Your friend
1.final_version:
Dear Sachi,

I’m writing to thank you for helping my little sister with her school project last week. She couldn’t stop talking about how patient and encouraging you were as you guided her through each step. Knowing that you stepped in when I wasn’t around means so much to our whole family, and your support made all the difference in boosting her confidence and enthusiasm.

Your willingness to share your skills and time is truly appreciated. I’d love to repay your kindness by treating you to a fun day out—maybe a trip to the art museum, lunch at that new café downtown, or a movie afternoon followed by ice cream. Let me know when you’re free, and we’ll plan something special to celebrate.

Thank you again for your generosity and for being such a wonderful friend to my sister.

Sincerely,
Your friend

2.details:
I know the bride from my home town. We have been friends for 21 years (since we were 4 years old)
I remember how she felt when she met her husband and when he proposed
I wish them a happy, long and healthy marriage filled with everything they desire
2.model_generation: Good evening everyone. I'm honored to stand here beside the most radiant bride, my dearest friend of twenty-one years. From childhood laughter chasing fireflies to whispered secrets late into warm summer nights, we've grown together, learning kindness, loyalty, and the magic of friendship. I remember the moment your eyes lit up when you first met him, how your heart seemed to unfold in pure joy. And when he proposed, that same smile beamed brighter than any star. Your love story inspires everyone lucky enough to witness it. Today, I celebrate your union and wish you a lifetime of happiness, love, health, and endless adventure. May your marriage be filled with all you desire, from spontaneous dance parties to quiet moments wrapped in each other’s arms. Cheers to this beautiful journey, and to decades of shared dreams ahead. Congratulations on finding your forever home.
2.final_version: Good evening everyone. I'm honored to stand here beside the most radiant bride, my dearest friend of twenty-one years. From childhood laughter chasing the neighbourhood boys down the street with balloons filled with paint, to staying up all night during sleepovers and sneaking snacks into the bedroom. We've grown together, learning kindness, loyalty, and the magic of friendship. I remember the night you came home after meeting Kai. You were so smitten and you would not let me wash the dress you wore that night because you said it smelled like him and I would ruin it. I thought you had gone insane. And when he proposed, it felt like he had bought you the moon and the stars. You would not stop starring at that gorgeous ring he put on your finger. Your love story inspires everyone lucky enough to witness it. Today, I celebrate your union and wish you a lifetime of happiness, love, health, and endless adventure. Yours is truly a love from the stars. Cheers to this beautiful journey, and to decades of shared dreams ahead. Congratulations on finding your forever home.

3.details:
Him and I met 3 years ago at a grand prix
It was raining and he came to stand next to me with his umbrella and that is when we fell in love
I am grateful for all the love he's given me and good things he has taught me
I will love him forever and ever and ever
3.model_generation:
Three years ago, beneath the storm clouds of the Grand Prix, I waited alone in the rain. You appeared then, offering your umbrella and a gentle smile that warmed me more than any shelter could. In that moment, I found my home.

I promise to cherish every part of who you are: your kindness, your laugh, the way you see the world with hope. You have shown me patience when I struggled, courage when I hesitated, and an unwavering love that has shaped me into my best self.

I vow to stand by you in sunshine and in storm, to support your dreams, to honor your passions, and to nurture our bond with honesty and grace. I commit my heart to you, forever and ever and ever, with all that I am and all I will become. I love you today, tomorrow, for birthdays and triumphs we have yet to share.
3.final_version:
Three years ago, beneath the stormy clouds of the Belgian Grand Prix I had spent all my year's savings for that race. I had no idea it would turn out to be the best decision of my life. I still remember you and your red umbrella standing a few meters away from me, a few minutes before the rain would bring us together and I would fall in love with the greatest man I have ever met.

I promise to cherish every part of who you are: your kindness, your laugh, the way you see the world with hope. I promise to love parts of you that you don't love. I promise to love you even on days when I don't. I promise to keep every promise I make to you.

I vow to stand by you in sunshine and in storm, to support your dreams, to honor your passions, and to nurture our bond with honesty and grace. I commit my heart to you, forever and ever and ever, with all that I am and all I will become. I love you today, tomorrow, for more grands prix and triumphs we have yet to share. I love you my love.

4.details:
Greetings to my friend Nyla
I know we have not been in touch for 4 months and I apologise
I just finished writing my board exams and I am now in Shanghai for vacation
I came across a shop that had those purple cats she likes and it made me think of her
I miss her and plan to visit Switzerland soon and I hope to see her.
4.model_generation:
Dear Nyla,

I hope you’re doing wonderfully. I realize it’s been four months since we last connected, and I’m truly sorry for my silence. I just wrapped up my board exams, and now I’m in Shanghai on vacation, soaking up the sights and sounds of the city. While exploring a charming little shop, I stumbled on those adorable purple cat figurines you love—they immediately brought you to mind and made me smile. I miss our conversations and your infectious laughter more than ever. I’ll be traveling to Switzerland soon, and the thought of wandering through the Alps would be so much better with you by my side. It would mean the world to me if we could catch up in person and create new memories together. Looking forward to hearing all about what you’ve been up to and hopefully seeing you very soon.

Love always, your friend in Shanghai.
4.final_version:
Dear Nyla,

It is me, your long lost academically drained friend. These past 4 months have been hell for me, I hope they have been kind to you. I am so sorry for not getting in touch with you for so long. I just came out of my cocoon and I am finally free.

I just finished writing my board exams. I cannot even tell you how treacherous it was, I felt like I was losing my mind in that exam room. I fear I may have performed poorly but I still have hope. I decided to get away from my school environment and take a vacation to Shanghai. Do you remember those purple dolls you were so obsessed with a few months ago? I walked past a shop this morning that sells them. I went in and bought you 4 of them for next time we meet.

I miss you so so so so much. I am thinking of extending my vacation outside of China and come see you in Switzerland. I would love to see those mountains you always send me pictures of. It looks really peaceful over there. 

I will bring you those dolls when I come.

Yours sincerely,
Your friend.

5.details:
Last week I took my brother's jacket without asking and mistakenly spilled vinegar on it and ruined it
I plan to apologise by buying him another jacket. It will not be the same as the last one but it will also be nice.
5.model_generation:
Dear brother,

I want to apologize for taking your jacket without asking last week and for accidentally spilling vinegar on it. I know how much you liked that jacket and I feel terrible that I ruined it. I should have asked you before borrowing it, and I’m sorry for both my thoughtlessness and for the damage I caused.

To make it up to you, I’ve picked out a new jacket that I hope you’ll like. It’s in a color and style I thought you might appreciate, but if it’s not quite right, please let me know so we can find something together. I understand if you’re upset, and I respect whatever feelings you have.

I value you and your things, and I promise to be more considerate in the future. Thank you for understanding. I hope you can forgive me, and I look forward to making this right.

Sincerely,  
Your brother
5.final_version:
Dear Mohau,

I write this letter because I know how enraged you must be right now. I assume you already saw your jacket and how it has been ruined. That was me, last week I took your jacket and wore it to a party my friend had invited me to and when we got there, we played a few games. One of the games involved vinegar and when it was my turn the vinegar spilled on me and onto your jacket.

I realise how stupid that sounds however it is the truth. I went online and I checked the jacket, unfortunately it is very far off my budget. Therefore, I have decided to buy a different jacket to replace the one I ruined. It is not the same one but it is just as good. I can send you the colour options if you would like so you can choose which colour you want.

Once again I am very sorry and I will do my best to make it up to you.

Yours sincerely
Your sister.

post_survey.present_other: Level of comfortability with the receiver.
